positive: Minimalist aesthetic featuring a geometric owl perched on a stylized crescent moon, rendered in negative space style. The owl and moon are composed of clean, abstract linework and solid geometric shapes, creating a strong, high-contrast silhouette. Use a limited palette of deep indigo blue, warm mustard yellow, and stark cream white. The composition must be highly centered, perfect for t-shirt or tote bag print, with crisp lines and sharp edges. Style: Modern graphic design, Scandinavian minimalism, tattoo art style. Lighting: Flat, even illumination for maximum print reproducibility. Aspect: Emblematic, central graphic.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, complex background, photorealism, messy, dirty, noise, multiple subjects, extra limbs, bad anatomy
